response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at Stripe, and relevant cloud/tooling work, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI solutions, vector databases, RAG architectures, or direct enterprise GenAI deployment — his AI experience appears incidental rather than core, and his education lacks an advanced degree in AI/CS.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP at Stripe
Proven full-stack expertise in TypeScript, cloud (AWS), and scalable systems
Strong track record of open-source contributions and technical leadership
concerns: No explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architectures
AI work appears secondary to general full-stack development; duration of dedicated AI experience unclear
Lacks advanced degree in AI/CS and minimal evidence of leading technical discovery with enterprise stakeholders
